- [ ] API / contract

## Validation

List exact commands run locally.

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Contract snapshots regenerated, if applicable
- [ ] E2E/a11y/visual checks run, if UI changed

## UI Primitive Disclosure

Required for UI changes.

- Primitives used from `@ai-desk/ui`:
- Radix primitives used directly, if any:
- New visual pattern already covered by Storybook or screenshot baseline:
- No hand-rolled Button/Input/Select/Dialog/Popover/Toast:
